name: Petti Di Pollo Alla Roma
recipeInstructions:
1. If necessary, debone the chicken breasts.
2. Slice each breast lengthwise into thirds.
3. Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
4. Cook the chicken until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes total.
5. Add onions and peppers to the pan; sauté for several minutes over medium heat.
6. Stir in tomato sauce, white wine, tabasco sauce, and stewed tomatoes.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Reduce heat to low and simmer until the chicken is cooked through and tender, about 15-20 minutes.
9. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top before serving.
